summary: Commit subject policy expansion and CI blocker fix are focused and verified.
findings: Reviewed final diff after hosted verify-unit failure. The additional pr-paths test change only aligns the mock with existing two-ref fallback behavior; commit subject policy still preserves strict task-context traceability.
missing_tests: No gap found after running targeted tests and full test:fast locally.
hidden_assumptions: Hosted verify-unit failure was a stale test expectation, not a runtime regression.
residual_risks: Non-task conventional subjects are broader than before, but only when no task context is present and generic summaries remain rejected.
